transcript.text:
[Pasta] [Ep. 1: Spicy Ramyun Noodles]
[First order for today]
[Lee Sun Kyun of Ramyun noodles]
Only 2 or 3 out of a 100 people eat this ramyun
[The real spice is here]
[I'll be one of the few]
It's really spicy
This is no joke
[Take a bite]
[And log out]
[Can't give up now]
[Will she be able to finish everything...?]
Hello everyone
I'm here near Kyung Hee University today
To eat some spicy ramyun noodles
They have different levels of spiciness

And known for their spicy ramyun
The students love going here
And said that it's really great
Let's go inside
[Real Ramyun] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]
There's a Real Madrid logo over there So I guess that's where the "Real" is from
He must be a fan
Hello
Is it just Ramyun and Kimbap on the menu?
Yes
-Free refills on rice? -Yes
Also unlimited snow cheese
Help yourself out at this side dish bar too
[Bean sprouts, pickled radish, kimchi, fried tofu, green onions, snow cheese]
So many post-its
This really shows its age

[Real ramyun is 10 out of 10!]
There are 3 levels total
[Yellow, Orange, Red]
How spicy can it be?
How spicy is red?
Only 2 or 3 out of a 100 people order it
2 or 3 out of 100?
Is it that spicy?
I've never had it myself
Wait...
I'm scared now
I'll order just 1 of that then
I should be good with 10 bowls total
Every bowl comes with 2 eggs
And also sujebi (hand-torn dough) So it's a lot of food
I would do 10 bowls,

But I try not to eat too much at restaurants
Is there a level in between Orange and Red?
Yes, I can do Spicy Orange
Then I'll do 1 Orange,
1 Spicy Orange,
And 1 Red
-Can you do Spicy Yellow too? -Yes
Then 1 Spicy Yellow.
And 2 Yellows, please
2 Yellow, 1 Orange, 1 Red, 1 Spicy Orange, 1 Spicy Yellow
Yes, correct
[Really...?]
-Are you okay? -Yes
6 is easy
[But can you handle the spiciness?]
[The owner's signature powders]

Thank you Is this Red?
Spicy Orange
Spicy Yellow
Sujebi inside
[Happy]
2 Yellows
And Orange here
Looks great
The color of the bowls are different too
So that you know the spice levels
Let's try some Yellow first
2 eggs in here
And sujebi
The yolk is visible
Let's pop it
Looks good I love it

Pop 1 more
Bon appetit
Some soup first
Yum
What?
The soup is delicious
What brand is it?
I really can't tell
Ottogi beef ramyun
Really?
This is it?
It's really good
Can't cook it like this from home
Right
-Do you use a special sauce? -Yes
It really is light

Compared to other ramyun noodles
Kids can eat this too
Lovely
The soup is great
I want to add some rice in here
Can't forget about kimchi
The best
Sujebi
This bowl of ramyun will really fill you up because of the sujebi and 2 eggs
Orange ramyun next
Some green onions
Some fried tofu
Bean sprouts too
This is level Orange
Spicy Orange next and then Red
Orange is supposed to be as spicy as the Fire Chicken noodles?

Isn't that really spicy?
That's spicy Completely different
[Pickled radish as a palate cleanser]
I thought it wouldn't be too different
This is a difference between heaven and hell
Wow, that's spicy
It's really spicy
It's a good type of spicy
The soup is thick and bold
Spicy!
I'm still doing okay
Very spicy
I need some of this
Actually spicy
This is perfect for those who love spicy foods
I will eat them 1 by 1

Just like this
Spicy, non-spicy, spicy, non-spicy, then spicy
Spicy Yellow
Let's see if there's a difference
This one is perfect
The soup is great
Spicy was good too, but
This is what I like
How many peach drinks do I need?
It has a kick But more like a regular ramyun
Amazing
Spicy Yellow is just about right
1 more
Excuse me,
May I have 1 more Cool Peace? 2 actually
Egg

It shouldn't be too different from Orange
[Let's get ready]
Let's put some snow cheese on top
[Trying to neutralize the spiciness out]
First time putting mozzarella cheese in ramyun noodles
This is Spicy Orange I'm scared
[Help!]
I didn't think it'd be much different from Orange But it's a lot spicier
I had to bite it off because it's hot
This is too spicy
It's really as spicy as Fire Chicken noodles
I feel like death
I want to return the Red
I don't want it
Help me
No, I can do it!

I will build a wall
I guess she's not good with spicy
But she had 4 bowls?
This is way too spicy Let's go next
I want Yellow
Not spicy at all
Yes, of course I like the non-spicy one
How am I going to eat Red?
A lot of customers are coming in and out
[Full house]
Yellow and Orange are the most popular
[She drank this much already?]
Cooked egg
I finished Yellow
I'm scared to eat Red
I'm terrified

Your belly would be full of liquid
10 cartons of Cool Peace
I'm scared!
Don't stop me
I can't give up now...
Excuse me
[Here]
I can't do it
Should I move them here?
I can't do it
This is like washing the noodles with water
But I have no choice
It's still spicy
I've had lots of spicy foods before
And this is pretty up there
Like the spiciest level of the Songju cold noodles

Send help
I try to eat spicy foods even if I'm in pain
Because I crave it from time to time
And it helps relieve stress
I don't really get sick from eating spicy foods
And I actually enjoy eating spicy
[Moving everything over to Yellow]
I won't drink all the soup Too spicy
[15 of them!]
1 last bite
[The drinks alone would get me full]
I feel great now that I had something spicy
But I still recommend Yellow and Orange
Thanks everyone~
She really finished everything
[Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
